text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Happiness is here, come this new year! Happy
New Year to the both of you, Trainer and Do—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait... Where's Doto?

We had plans to spend New Year's together, but
I've been waiting a while, and Meisho Doto has
yet to turn up.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huuuuh?! I'm sure we promised to celebrate New
Year's together...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sniff! Traineeer, where are youuu?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: (Oh? Isn't that... Ayabe? She's all by herself...)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(I wonder what she's praying for. She looks so
serious, and also... so lonely.)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
(Ah, she's on the move... Should I really... just
leave her alone?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... U-um, A-Aya... Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's you... What is it?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Well... Um...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I-I-I'll g-get you some takoyaki, my treat!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Huh... So I looked that down? And that's why
you...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, y-yeah. And... a-also to congratulate you
on your win at Hanshin...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That explains the takoyaki, then...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I know you're only trying to be considerate.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, no, don't, don't say that! I mean...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You... seemed so serious when you were praying...
What did you... wish for?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What are you racing for?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: What am I... racing for?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah. What's the reason?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well, um... I would like to become more
confident... I think...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I see. As for me... I race for my other self.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
For my younger sister... the one I lost the day we
were born.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have to run well enough for both of us. I have to
shine for her—that's the most I can do to atone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So... I made a promise at this shrine. During my
classic year, I'm going to win as many races as I
can for my sister.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: For your sister... So that's...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's my reason. If I came across as stern to
you, that's why.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
What do you say to accepting that information as
payment for the takoyaki? I need to be going
now.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Look, Trainer! It's Doto, I found her!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Waaahaaah!

Meisho Doto bursts into tears the moment we
find her. I calm her down before asking what's
wrong.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how tragic... I didn't know Ayabe had such an
unlucky past...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I got it all wrong...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I thought it was my body that's not good enough,
but it's really my heart. My feelings... aren't
enough.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe is shouldering such a heavy mission, but
she's still running to honor her sister's memory.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's like that too. She once told me that
she's destined to shine happiness upon all the
people in the world.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And then there's me, only running for myself. For
some selfish illusions of confidence...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
No matter how much I may train... it could never
get me anywheeere... Waaah!

I can feel her pain through the anguish in her
voice. However...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, don't cry, Doto! Please don't cry! There is
hope for you, surely!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure your trainer has a few choice words that
will cheer you right up. Come on, Trainer, say
something!
choice_data_list: Your heart's going through a growth spurt!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So my heart's going through the same thing... as
my body? Oh... I didn't know. So... that's why my
ambitions are small?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yup, you've got that right! It won't be too long
until you start thinking big!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You've still got a long way to go, Doto. Give it
some time, and with luck, things will start going
your way.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ngh, maybe you're right... That would be... nice.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll choose to believe you two. I would like
to do more things that will help me grow.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, mhm! That's a great idea. In fact, let's start
off the new year with a challenge. Trainer, what
should we do?

This could be a good opportunity to have her let
off some steam. Now, what would be an
appropriate activity?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, a mountain hike sounds like great fun! I'll
see you when you've returned!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh, it's a suspension bridge! Th-there's no
way I can do this.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can see it now—it'll start wobbling, I'll slip, and
then I'll fall right off!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-b-b-but I can't keep being a coward... I need to
challenge myself!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Three, two,one, GO! Kyaaaagh!
Crack! Creak!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh thank goodness, I made it over alive!

Meisho Doto just barely makes it across the
bridge—a bit more courageous than before.

All of these little experiences will keep adding up.
I think that this year, I'll start encouraging her to
let her dreams grow bigger.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that sounds like a blast! You've gotta
check out the lucky bags they've got on sale for
New Year's!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow, Trainer... It's the sweets corner. Look at all
these lovely delectables.
choice_data_list: Let's bring some back to my office to eat.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
What? It's okay to buy some for ourselves? Oh,
what a wonderful way to start the year!

Growth needs nurturing. Since she started off the
day in tears, I'll have to make sure she fully
recuperates, with the help of some comforting
food.

On the way home, I suddenly have a
thought—there's no need to rush. This spring, our
journey should be walked slow and steady.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, some New Year's fun! Let's fly kites and
spin tops!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaaagh... Traineeer, my kite hit the ground and
got ripped to pieces.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Waaagh... I threw the top too hard—oh, no, no,
nooo...

Meisho Doto flies into her usual panic. But our
fun activities have left her with a few new tricks.

And it dawns on me, there's no need to rush. This
spring, our journey up should be walked slow and
steady.
